title: Does the F1 twin rig (frozen vs adaptive codec, 10M, drill scale) have the power, instruments and a specified metric to make a null attributable to the mechanism? Verdict = rig LICENSED or REFUSED.
verdict: rig = REFUSED (2/5 PASS) — G-1/G-2 unevaluable (generator does not exist); G-4 triggered but its interpretation is a card defect (it tests the CONTROL arm, which is supposed to sit at chance); G-3/G-5 PASS. salvage l4(b) STANDS: M=109/120 p=1.9e-21, C3 liveness=110/120.
resolved: G-5 RESOLVED — the H_9288 protocol was intact in the v1 repo (`anima`), not lost. Recovery falsified two frozen premises: F2 is forced-choice bacc (chance 0.50), not an F-score; n_items=120.

title: Does the recovered anchor survive a correct bounds check, and can the generator produce the contrast the pilot needs?
verdict: rig = LICENSED (10/10, repair re-run). Anchor all green (B-1..B-4, l4(b) stands, replicated). Generator repaired: N-2 contrast now frozen 0/12 + refit 12/12 (three fixes: >=2-syllable novel affixes, polarity mark split to a separate token so BPE stops fusing affix+mark, novel over-weighted per NAT-ATOM), N-4 co-occurrence 0 (was a duplicate-function + parse-ambiguity artifact, never a leak). H_004 pilot may fire.

title: Measure Δ_pilot = F2(oracle) − F2(frozen) — the ceiling of the codec effect. Δ_pilot≥0.20 licenses the twin; below it REFUSED.
verdict: TWIN-REFUSED-STRUCTURAL at $0. Repaired rig (donor pairs, genspec 75b19bba) closes order-1 (G-A 0.527, G-B 0.551) but G-C order-2 bigram=0.9954: frozen has a trivial bigram path. THEOREM (verified 12/12): oracle-fusable <=> n-gram-recoverable, so atomicity is not isolable from n-gram binding for a fixed morpheme. Delta_pilot>=0.20 structurally impossible. No torch run fired — $0 guard battery decisive.
genspec_sha256: 75b19bba071331ce (donor-pair repair; superseded fbcf0c8 for the pilot)
precheck: run_proxy.py · numpy · $0 · oracle F2=0.923 vs frozen F2=0.971 · Δ_proxy=-0.048

title: Does any available stream carry day-specific cross-boundary information for a diary to transport? oracle-diary ceiling as the pre-anchored delta_min.
verdict: ANCHORED under the strict pre-registered 3-estimator rule. anima clears the shuffle floor on ALL THREE estimators (gzip +0.031, ppm +0.221, markov6 +0.043 over-floor, all >eps, all positive); hexa-lang confirms on the order-aware pair (gzip at its LZ floor); sidecar (thin) flat. Liveness 7.79 bpb PASS. Resolved from PENDING at $0 by building an efficient order-6 Markov estimator (the 3rd of the battery; the mean-pooled nlm.py was the wrong tool). F3 LIVE — opposite of the F1 terminal. delta_min := ceiling/2, range [~0.015,~0.11] bpb, conservative floor ~0.02.

title: F1 restated: the codec compresses the credit-assignment span; a refit organ maintains it under drift. Parked after the H_004 terminal.

tier: 🔴 FALSIFIED (F3 k-token diary · twin cancelled at $0)
title: Does a k<=4096 hindsight extract retain the unbounded diary ceiling? Gates the F3 twin's training spend.
verdict: F3-BOUNDED-REFUSED. A hindsight top-lines k<=4096 text extract retains ~4% of anima's +0.27 full-day ceiling (over-floor +0.012 markov6 / +0.019 ppm, both <eps). The day-MI is distributed across ~83KB, not localizable. KILLS F3's primary k-token readable-diary form + cancels the ~12h twin at $0; the continuous-m variant is a higher bound not directly measured but faces the distributed-MI headwind. Liveness PASS (0.366).

title: Is the owner's real message stream predictable AND high-dimensional (the F7/F5 premise)? $0 on the owner transcript substrate.
verdict: PENDING / BORDERLINE-WEAK-POSITIVE. 241 genuine owner sessions from ~/.claude/projects. Cross-session legibility (markov6 over-floor) = +0.0207 (~eps 0.02); owner-self participation ratio = 2.27 (~floor 2.0). Both AT threshold = weak positive (owner is legible, >1-bit, but barely). PENDING because the markov6 liveness read negative on high-entropy synthetic planted data (estimator artifact; gzip liveness passes +6.66) — needs a text-like liveness rebuild. Owner substrate is real + $0-checkable; premise not cleanly resolved.
